<!-- Generated by h-alter. -->
# Core Beliefs

## Agent = Model + Harness

Good output needs capable models, high-quality repo context, useful tools, and
observable feedback.

## State Intent, Protect Invariants

State desired outcomes, constraints, non-goals, and evidence. Let the agent choose
execution details. Put durable safety invariants in formatters, linters, hooks,
typecheckers, tests, or validators; keep preferences adaptable.

## Observe Outcomes

When behavior can run, inspect it. Direct evidence beats a persuasive explanation.

## Ratchet From Evidence

Add guardrails only when real failures justify them. Remove scaffolding when its
cost exceeds its current value.

## Preserve Ownership

Keep the repo as system of record. Preserve human-authored content and ask on
conflict.
